title: Add notification system
original_text: Implemented multi-channel notification system. Added email notifications with templates. Implemented SMS notifications for critical alerts. Added push notifications for mobile apps. Implemented in-app notification center. Added notification preferences per user. Implemented notification scheduling and batching. Added notification analytics and delivery tracking. Added tests for notifications. Result: 52 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Implement SMS notifications for critical alerts
- Add push notifications for mobile apps
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(notify): implement multi-channel notification system"
